tone: warm, hopeful, suitable for children aged 6-10

characters.name: Elena
characters.description: A curious 10-year-old girl with auburn hair and bright green eyes

characters.name: Max
characters.description: Elena's loyal dog, a golden retriever with a red bandana

plot: Elena discovers an old map in her grandmother's attic that leads her and her dog Max on a journey through an enchanted forest to find a lost library full of living books.
